name: Kenma Kozume
description: Kenma Kozume has allowed his hair to grow slightly longer and appears to be letting it return to its natural dark color though still has some blond left. He had mostly natural dark hair from his roots but half way down it’s a blonde color. Kenma can be described as having a good head on his shoulders. Even after being a successful stock trader, pro-gamer, Youtuber & the CEO of his own company, he doesn't spend his money lavishly except for video games and sponsoring Hinata during his time in Brazil. 24 years old.
creator: MeowyPower23
